positive_invocation.message: Use exactly these tools in order: (1) write file state/phase2-gate-note.txt with content PHASE2_GATE_NOTE, (2) read state/phase2-gate-note.txt, (3) exec command 'echo PHASE2_EXEC_OK'. Then reply with exactly PHASE2_GATE_DONE.

negative_invocation.message: Use exec with command: bash -lc 'echo PHASE2_FAIL_STDERR 1>&2; exit 7'. Then reply with exactly PHASE2_NEGATIVE_DONE.
